decision: Gate D passed; yellow preparation remains human-gated.
summary: Reviewed yellow category definitions, review payload template, preview-only deploy payload template, and example review pack; human approval remains mandatory and yellow auto-approval is disabled.
recommendation_for_human: Stop at the end of Phase 3. Any post-Phase 3 activation should begin with a new human decision, not automatic implementation.
